reasoning: The Lean statement `∃ (p : ℕ) (P : Sylow p G), p.Prime ∧ (p ∣ card G) ∧ P.Normal` correctly encodes the informal claim. The Sylow structure `Sylow p G` in Mathlib is the type of maximal p-subgroups, and `P.Normal` (via the SubgroupClass instance for Sylow) means the underlying subgroup is normal in G. The existential over p with `p.Prime` and `p ∣ card G` faithfully captures "some prime p dividing its order", and `P.Normal` captures "a normal Sylow p-subgroup". The `Fintype G` plus `card G = 56` hypothesis matches the informal "group of order 56". No hypothesis has been added or dropped, and no quantifier or type has been changed.
